REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE INDICATES THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED ON MARCH 7, 2023 VIA EMAIL AND US MAIL, EXACTLY 16 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO ACCOUNT FOR ADDITIONAL 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR US MAIL SERVICE, OR AN ADDITIONAL 2 COURT DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. FURTHERMORE, DEFENDANT DID NOT FILE A STIPULATION PERMITTING ELECTRONIC SERVICE TO PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER. (CRC RULE 2.251(C)(3)(B).) LATE-FILED (6 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING) AND UNAUTHORIZED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS STRICKEN. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STEVE HWANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all real property/mortgage cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STEVE HWANG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all real property/mortgage cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice. Proof of service on file indicates that the motion was served on March 7, 2023 via email and US mail, exactly 16 days before the hearing. Moving party failed to account for additional 5 calendar days for US mail service, or an additional 2 court days for e-service. Furthermore, Defendant did not file a stipulation permitting electronic service to Plaintiff in pro per. (CRC Rule 2.251(c)(3)(B).) Late-filed (6 court days before the hearing) and unauthorized first amended complaint is stricken. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice. Proof of service on file indicates that the motion was served on March 7, 2023 via email and US mail, exactly 16 days before the hearing. Moving party failed to account for additional 5 calendar days for US mail service, or an additional 2 court days for e-service. Furthermore, Defendant did not file a stipulation permitting electronic service to Plaintiff in pro per. (CRC Rule 2.251(c)(3)(B).) Late-filed (6 court days before the hearing) and unauthorized first amended complaint is stricken.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)
